# Tier fallthrough cascade

When Tier 0 (hybrid) returns fewer than `[search].min_results` hits, the
orchestrator falls through to Tier 1 (BM25-only), then Tier 2 (CATALOG.md
grep), then Tier 3 (fs-grep) — within an aggregate latency budget enforced
via AbortController.

Each SearchHit carries `tier_used` reflecting the tier that produced it.
